title: Farmers Respite | Herbal Brews Compatibility
description: This datapack makes Farmers Respite and Herbal Brews use FR kettle brewing & pouring with HB tea leaves drying mechanics.
body:
# Makes Farmer's Respite and Herbal Brews compatible
The datapack uses the extraction of tea leaves from flowers and plants from Herbal Breas, in turn, when drying tea leaves, variations of tea leaves from Farmer's Respite are obtained. The datapack also runs on a tea brewing system through a Farmer's Respite kettle.

**ATTENTION** Requires [[Let's Do Addon] Fluids](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-addon-fluids) because of Farmer's Respite pouring system.

![Lavender Tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10973da3ec8b76c7231071d6d0aa53522cc3ae5a.png)
